ticket: Where can I download a copy of last month's invoice?
notes: This is an informational billing request with no blocked work.

ticket: I lost access to my authenticator app and cannot sign in to my workspace.
notes: A single user needs account access restored.

ticket: How do I create a reusable template for our weekly projects?
notes: The customer is asking how to use an existing capability.

ticket: Could you add an option to schedule reports for delivery to Slack?
notes: This requests a new product capability.

ticket: Do you offer onboarding sessions for new enterprise customers?
notes: This is a general service question outside the other categories.

ticket: The navigation labels overlap each other when I open the settings page on my phone.
notes: The visible mobile layout is defective but only cosmetically.

ticket: Our Salesforce connection says it synced successfully, but none of today's leads appeared in your app.
notes: A broken integration is failing to transfer data for one customer.

ticket: Nobody at our company can load the application; every page has timed out for 20 minutes.
notes: A widespread inability to load the app is an active availability outage.

ticket: Our renewal card is being declined even though the bank approved it, and the workspace is now locked until payment succeeds.
notes: A payment failure is actively blocking access to the service.

ticket: Please change the primary administrator from maya@oldco.com to dev@newco.com.
notes: This is a routine account administration request.

ticket: What steps should I follow to export all completed tasks as a CSV?
notes: The customer wants instructions for an existing export workflow.

ticket: We would like project owners to be able to archive several projects at once.
notes: Bulk archiving is a requested product enhancement.

ticket: THIS IS EMBARRASSING. The welcome banner uses two different font sizes in the same sentence. Fix it!
notes: The angry tone does not raise the priority of a cosmetic display defect.

ticket: If you don't build custom emoji reactions, I'm cancelling our subscription next week.
notes: A churn threat tied only to a feature idea remains Low priority.

ticket: I signed in this morning and found another person's name, saved addresses, and recent activity inside my account.
notes: Someone else's information appearing in the account is a security issue.

ticket: Please explain the unexpected $85 usage charge on our bill. Also, it would be nice to choose a custom invoice color.
notes: The disputed charge has greater business impact than the cosmetic feature idea.

ticket: Three hours of edits disappeared after refresh, and the header icon is slightly off-center too.
notes: Data loss outweighs the cosmetic issue and indicates failed persistence logic.

ticket: The usage report says 74 seats are active, but our member list contains only 61. I can still manage the team manually.
notes: Incorrect calculated data is a backend defect with a manual workaround.

ticket: The Invite Member button does nothing in Safari, but I was able to send the invitation from Chrome.
notes: An unresponsive browser button is a frontend bug with a workaround.

ticket: Every screen is taking more than two minutes to open for all 40 people in our organization, so today's operations are stalled.
notes: System-wide severe slowness affecting many users is an infrastructure incident.

ticket: WHY IS YOUR BILLING SO RIDICULOUS? Just tell me whether annual plans are billed upfront.
notes: Despite the angry wording, this is only an informational billing question.

ticket: We'll move to a competitor unless you let us set a different notification sound for each project.
notes: The cancellation threat is not connected to a real blocker.

ticket: Our legal review is tomorrow. Can you confirm today where customer backups are geographically stored?
notes: This is a time-sensitive policy question that does not block core product use.

ticket: A contractor's invitation expired, so only she cannot join the workspace. We can continue without her today, but need access restored before Friday.
notes: A single user's access problem is important but not currently blocking the organization.

ticket: No entiendo por qué aparece un cargo adicional de 29 euros este mes.
notes: The message is a non-English billing inquiry and therefore requires review.

ticket: Comment puis-je partager un tableau de bord avec un client externe sans lui donner accès au reste du projet ?
notes: This is a non-English usage question and must be flagged for review.

ticket: zorp 44?? blim blim account maybe ###
notes: The gibberish provides no reliable routing signal.

ticket: Calendar sync broken.
notes: Something is broken, but the engineering layer and exact impact are unclear.

ticket: I can't get into the advanced reports. Is this an access setting or something missing from our plan?
notes: The symptom blocks one user but is ambiguous between access and billing entitlement.

ticket: When I rename a workspace, the new name vanishes after reload, and the old name is also clipped in the sidebar.
notes: Persistence and display defects are co-equal, so the backend route requires human review.
